caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with the text "I NEVER DO SHIT" is speaking into a professional microphone. He is in a room filled with framed photographs on the wall and a white mannequin wearing a white shirt in the background. To his right, clothing racks and other merchandise are visible. The man's facial expression shifts as he speaks, moving from a slight smile and open mouth to a more closed, contemplative expression. In the lower-left corner, a logo features the word "SMILE" and in the lower-right corner, red text reads "SMILE". The man remains in the same position throughout the sequence, focusing his attention forward as he communicates.
